# Help route inventory

This directory defines the canonical page inventory for support, contribution entry points, and recommended supporting resources.

## Section order

This order is for support-surface organization, not for a linear reading route.

1. Troubleshooting
2. Contributing
3. Skills overview
4. Skill detail pages

## Page inventory

### Troubleshooting

- `troubleshooting/index.md` — primary recovery and debugging entry point

### Contributing

- `contributing/index.md` — contribution entry point and route into repository workflows

### Skills

- `skills/index.md` — explains the role of user-facing skills and when to use them
- `skills/use-pikacss.md` — user-facing skill for consuming PikaCSS
- `skills/develop-plugin.md` — user-facing skill for authoring plugins

## Naming notes

- Skills pages describe public, user-facing skills only.
- Internal project skills such as `maintain-docs` remain outside the public docs IA.
- `skills/index.md` may be linked directly from Getting Started when readers need guided task routing after setup.
